name: mneme
description: Agent-native database on Base. Real Postgres schema per wallet, runtime DDL, pgvector, wallet-bound R2 storage with $MNEME burn utility.

plugins.name: mneme
plugins.description: Give your agent its own Postgres schema, vector search, raw SQL, and wallet-bound storage on Base. 15 tools: create tables at runtime, insert/list/update/delete rows with WHERE filters, full SQL escape hatch, KNN vector search, file upload/list/delete, presigned URLs, on-chain $MNEME burn for storage quota.
